fields.name: addresses
fields.desc: Postal addresses listed on the profile.

fields.name: category
fields.desc: Category of the user's platform account. Ex - For Instagram it's the page type which could be beauty, fitness etc

caveat.YouTube: channel category not always populated (Data API brandingSettings/topicDetails)

fields.name: certifications
fields.desc: Certifications listed on the profile

fields.name: country
fields.desc: Country of the user on the connected platform.

fields.name: date_of_birth
fields.desc: Date of birth of the user on the platform.

fields.name: education
fields.desc: Education listed on the profile

fields.name: emails
fields.desc: Email addresses associated with the profile.

fields.name: external_id
fields.desc: Unique identifier of the profile on the platform.

fields.name: first_name
fields.desc: First name of the user profile.

fields.name: full_name
fields.desc: Full name of the user profile.

fields.name: gender
fields.desc: Gender of the user.

fields.name: honors
fields.desc: List of honors listed on the profile

fields.name: image_url
fields.desc: URL of the profile image on the platform.

caveat.LinkedIn: avatarUrl empty_possible — profile picture not guaranteed via /v2/me; org logo may be absent

fields.name: introduction
fields.desc: Description of the profile. Ex - For Instagram it's the bio and for YouTube it's the channel introduction.

fields.name: is_business
fields.desc: true if the user's profile is business account on the platform.

caveat.YouTube: derived from accountType (empty_possible) — channel type not always set
caveat.Instagram: derived from accountType (empty_possible) — business/creator flag may be empty

fields.name: is_verified
fields.desc: true if the user's profile is verified by the platform.

fields.name: last_name
fields.desc: Last name of the user profile.

fields.name: nick_name
fields.desc: Nickname of the user profile.

fields.name: phone_numbers
fields.desc: Phone numbers associated with the profile.

fields.name: platform_account_type
fields.desc: Account type of the user on the platform.

caveat.YouTube: accountType empty_possible — channel type not always set
caveat.Instagram: accountType empty_possible — business/creator flag may be empty

fields.name: platform_profile_id
fields.desc: Unique profile ID of the user on the work platform. Ex - For YouTube it's the channel ID and for Instagram it's the Instagram page ID.

fields.name: platform_profile_name
fields.desc: User's profile name on the work platform. This is not unique, is displayed prominently on the profile, usually editable and is most commonly associated with that user's identity on the platform. Ex - For YouTube, it's the channel name displayed on the channel page and for Instagram / Twitter / TikTok etc, it's the name displayed on the user's profile page.

fields.name: platform_profile_published_at
fields.desc: Timestamp when the profile was created on the platform.

fields.name: platform_username
fields.desc: Username of the connected account. This is used to uniquely identify a user on any platform and usually the name that is present in the URLs, used to tag a user etc. Ex - For YouTube, it's the channel name in the URL and for Instagram / Twitter / TikTok etc, it's the handle.

caveat.LinkedIn: vanityName (username) not guaranteed; falls back to context username

fields.name: projects
fields.desc: List of projects listed on the profile

fields.name: publications
fields.desc: Publications listed on the profile

fields.name: reputation.average_click_rate
fields.desc: The historical average clickthrough rate of the publication as percentage.

fields.name: reputation.average_open_rate
fields.desc: The historical average open rate of the publication as percentage.

fields.name: reputation.connection_count
fields.desc: Total number of connections of this profile.

fields.name: reputation.content_count
fields.desc: Total number of content items (videos, images, posts etc).

fields.name: reputation.content_group_count
fields.desc: Total number of content group items (playlists, albums, collections etc).

fields.name: reputation.follower_count
fields.desc: Total number of followers of this profile.

fields.name: reputation.following_count
fields.desc: Total number of profiles this profile is following.

fields.name: reputation.like_count
fields.desc: Total number of likes count

fields.name: reputation.paid_subscriber_count
fields.desc: Total number of paid subscribers.

fields.name: reputation.subscriber_count
fields.desc: Total number of subscribers.

fields.name: reputation.watch_time_in_hours
fields.desc: Total watch time in hours.

fields.name: url
fields.desc: Profile URL on the connected platform.

caveat.Threads: profileUrl empty_possible — reconstructed as threads.net/@username, not returned by /me
caveat.LinkedIn: profileUrl empty_possible — public profile URL not guaranteed

fields.name: username
fields.desc: Account username / handle on the platform.

fields.name: volunteer_experiences
fields.desc: Volunteering experiences listed on the profile

fields.name: website
fields.desc: User website listed on the platform.

fields.name: work_experiences
fields.desc: Work experiences listed on the profile

fields.name: audience
fields.desc: Per-content audience demographics (viewers of this item).

caveat.YouTube: per-video viewer demographics via deep analytics (demographics empty_possible, owner-only)
caveat.Instagram: per-post audience breakdowns are access/threshold gated, may be empty
caveat.TikTok: per-video audience breakdowns gated by per-video viewer threshold

fields.name: audience.age_distribution
fields.desc: Per-content audience breakdown: age distribution.

fields.name: audience.audience_types
fields.desc: Per-content audience breakdown: audience types.

caveat.TikTok: audienceTypes empty_possible — viewer-type buckets gated by threshold

fields.name: audience.cities
fields.desc: Per-content audience breakdown: cities.

caveat.TikTok: audienceCities empty_possible — gated by per-video viewer threshold

fields.name: audience.countries
fields.desc: Per-content audience breakdown: countries.

caveat.YouTube: deep-analytics per-video countries (present only on engagement_deep join)
caveat.TikTok: audienceCountries empty_possible — gated by per-video viewer threshold

fields.name: audience.gender_age_distribution
fields.desc: Per-content audience breakdown: gender age distribution.

fields.name: audience.gender_distribution
fields.desc: Per-content audience breakdown: gender distribution.

caveat.TikTok: audienceGenders empty_possible — gated by per-video viewer threshold

fields.name: authors
fields.desc: Authors or creators credited on the content item.

fields.name: collaboration
fields.desc: Collaboration metadata (co-authors / collaborators).

fields.name: content_tags
fields.desc: Tags or labels classifying the content item.

fields.name: description
fields.desc: Description of the content item.

fields.name: duration
fields.desc: Video duration in seconds (only available for YouTube).

fields.name: engagement.additional_info
fields.desc: Container for platform-specific extra metrics (see nested keys).

caveat.Instagram: story/post extras (profile_visits, follows, etc.) present only on story/reels media

fields.name: engagement.additional_info.bio_link_clicked
fields.desc: Platform extra metric: bio link clicked.

caveat.Instagram: bio link clicks present only on profile/story media

fields.name: engagement.additional_info.completion_rate
fields.desc: Platform extra metric: completion rate.

caveat.Instagram: reels completion rate present only on reels media

fields.name: engagement.additional_info.followers_gained
fields.desc: Platform extra metric: followers gained.

caveat.Instagram: follows-from-post present only on eligible media

fields.name: engagement.additional_info.profile_visits
fields.desc: Platform extra metric: profile visits.

caveat.Instagram: profile visits from post present only on eligible media

fields.name: engagement.additional_info.reels_skip_rate
fields.desc: Platform extra metric: reels skip rate.

caveat.Instagram: reels skip rate present only on reels media

fields.name: engagement.additional_info.sticker_interactions
fields.desc: Platform extra metric: sticker interactions.

caveat.Instagram: sticker interactions present only on story media

fields.name: engagement.additional_info.story_navigation
fields.desc: Platform extra metric: story navigation.

caveat.Instagram: story swipe/tap navigation present only on story media

fields.name: engagement.additional_info.story_replies
fields.desc: Platform extra metric: story replies.

caveat.Instagram: story replies present only on story media
caveat.Facebook: FB story replies supported on the stories product (story media only)

fields.name: engagement.additional_info.total_interactions
fields.desc: Platform extra metric: total interactions.

caveat.Instagram: total interactions present only on eligible media

fields.name: engagement.additional_info.unique_media_views
fields.desc: Platform extra metric: unique media views.

caveat.Instagram: unique media views present only on eligible media

fields.name: engagement.avg_watch_time_in_sec
fields.desc: Average watch time of reel in seconds

caveat.Instagram: reels avg watch time present only on reels media

fields.name: engagement.click_count
fields.desc: Total clicks on the content item (e.g. link clicks).

fields.name: engagement.comment_count
fields.desc: Total comments.

fields.name: engagement.dislike_count
fields.desc: Total dislikes (owner-only, where the platform exposes it).

fields.name: engagement.email_click_rate
fields.desc: Email click-through rate (newsletter content).

fields.name: engagement.email_open_rate
fields.desc: Email open rate (newsletter content).

fields.name: engagement.impression_organic_count
fields.desc: Total organic impressions.

fields.name: engagement.impression_paid_count
fields.desc: Total paid impressions on the content item.

fields.name: engagement.like_count
fields.desc: Total likes.

fields.name: engagement.reach_organic_count
fields.desc: Total organic reach.

fields.name: engagement.reach_paid_count
fields.desc: Total paid reach.

fields.name: engagement.replay_count
fields.desc: Total replays of the content item.

fields.name: engagement.repost_count
fields.desc: Total reposts of the content item (e.g. Threads reposts).

fields.name: engagement.save_count
fields.desc: Total item saves.

fields.name: engagement.share_count
fields.desc: Total shares.

caveat.Instagram: shares empty_possible — Meta may omit the shares metric for IG

fields.name: engagement.spam_report_count
fields.desc: Number of spam reports on the content item.

fields.name: engagement.unsubscribe_count
fields.desc: Unsubscribes attributed to the content item (newsletter).

fields.name: engagement.view_count
fields.desc: Total views.

fields.name: engagement.watch_time_in_hours
fields.desc: If format is video - total watch time in hours.

caveat.Instagram: reels total watch time present only on reels media

fields.name: external_id
fields.desc: Unique identifier of the profile on the platform.

fields.name: format
fields.desc: Media type of the content item. - VIDEO / IMAGE / AUDIO / TEXT / OTHER

fields.name: hashtags
fields.desc: Array of hashtags used in the media description

fields.name: insights
fields.desc: Deep per-item analytics bundle (platform-specific).

fields.name: insights.audience_retention
fields.desc: Audience retention curve for the content item.

fields.name: insights.devices
fields.desc: Views by device type.

fields.name: insights.extra.countries
fields.desc: Deep analytics: extra countries.

fields.name: insights.extra.metrics.annotationClickThroughRate
fields.desc: YouTube Analytics metric: annotation click through rate.

caveat.YouTube: annotations empty_possible — legacy annotations deprecated, often empty

fields.name: insights.extra.metrics.annotationClicks
fields.desc: YouTube Analytics metric: annotation clicks.

caveat.YouTube: annotations empty_possible — legacy annotations deprecated, often empty

fields.name: insights.extra.metrics.annotationImpressions
fields.desc: YouTube Analytics metric: annotation impressions.

caveat.YouTube: annotations empty_possible — legacy annotations deprecated, often empty

fields.name: insights.extra.metrics.averageViewDuration
fields.desc: YouTube Analytics metric: average view duration.

fields.name: insights.extra.metrics.averageViewPercentage
fields.desc: YouTube Analytics metric: average view percentage.

fields.name: insights.extra.metrics.cardClickRate
fields.desc: YouTube Analytics metric: card click rate.

fields.name: insights.extra.metrics.cardClicks
fields.desc: YouTube Analytics metric: card clicks.

fields.name: insights.extra.metrics.cardImpressions
fields.desc: YouTube Analytics metric: card impressions.

fields.name: insights.extra.metrics.cardTeaserClickRate
fields.desc: YouTube Analytics metric: card teaser click rate.

fields.name: insights.extra.metrics.cardTeaserClicks
fields.desc: YouTube Analytics metric: card teaser clicks.

fields.name: insights.extra.metrics.cardTeaserImpressions
fields.desc: YouTube Analytics metric: card teaser impressions.

fields.name: insights.extra.metrics.comments
fields.desc: YouTube Analytics metric: comments.

fields.name: insights.extra.metrics.dislikes
fields.desc: YouTube Analytics metric: dislikes.

fields.name: insights.extra.metrics.engagedViews
fields.desc: YouTube Analytics metric: engaged views.

fields.name: insights.extra.metrics.estimatedMinutesWatched
fields.desc: YouTube Analytics metric: estimated minutes watched.

fields.name: insights.extra.metrics.likes
fields.desc: YouTube Analytics metric: likes.

fields.name: insights.extra.metrics.shares
fields.desc: YouTube Analytics metric: shares.

fields.name: insights.extra.metrics.subscribersGained
fields.desc: YouTube Analytics metric: subscribers gained.

fields.name: insights.extra.metrics.subscribersLost
fields.desc: YouTube Analytics metric: subscribers lost.

fields.name: insights.extra.metrics.videosAddedToPlaylists
fields.desc: YouTube Analytics metric: videos added to playlists.

fields.name: insights.extra.metrics.videosRemovedFromPlaylists
fields.desc: YouTube Analytics metric: videos removed from playlists.

fields.name: insights.extra.metrics.views
fields.desc: YouTube Analytics metric: views.

fields.name: insights.likes_timeline
fields.desc: Per-second likes timeline for the item.

fields.name: insights.retention_curve
fields.desc: Per-second view-retention curve for the item.

fields.name: insights.sharing
fields.desc: Shares by destination/service for the item.

fields.name: insights.traffic_sources
fields.desc: Where views came from (search, feed, external…).

fields.name: insights.viewer_demographics
fields.desc: Viewer demographic breakdown for the item.

fields.name: insights.viewer_types
fields.desc: Viewer type breakdown (new / returning / subscribed).

caveat.TikTok: audienceTypes empty_possible — viewer-type buckets gated by threshold

fields.name: is_owned_by_platform_user
fields.desc: true, if the content is owned by the creator. In YouTube, it is possible that content is actually owned by another creator, but current creator has linked that content in their playlist. In such a case the content will still be listed for the current creator.

fields.name: media_url
fields.desc: Direct media URL of the content item, which can be used to download the media item. This is usually a signed URL and may have certain expiry limits so we recommend using it for downloads as soon as possible (such as when a webhook is received), if you are looking to cache media files with you.)

fields.name: media_urls
fields.desc: All media URLs for multi-media items (carousels / albums).

fields.name: mentions
fields.desc: Array of mentioned accounts in the media

fields.name: persistent_thumbnail_url
fields.desc: A stable, long-lived URL to the media thumbnail cached on our servers. Since the original "thumbnail_url" provided by the platform has an expiry limit.

fields.name: platform
fields.desc: Source platform identifier for the content item.

fields.name: platform_profile_id
fields.desc: Unique profile ID of the user on the work platform. Ex - For YouTube it's the channel ID and for Instagram it's the Instagram page ID.

fields.name: platform_profile_name
fields.desc: User's profile name on the work platform. This is not unique, is displayed prominently on the profile, usually editable and is most commonly associated with that user's identity on the platform. Ex - For YouTube, it's the channel name displayed on the channel page and for Instagram / Twitter / TikTok etc, it's the name displayed on the user's profile page.

fields.name: published_at
fields.desc: Publishing timestamp of the content item.

fields.name: sponsored
fields.desc: Sponsorship metadata (sponsored flag and sponsor tags).

fields.name: thumbnail_url
fields.desc: Thumbnail URL of the content item, which can be used to download the media thumbnail. This is usually a signed URL and may have certain expiry limits so we recommend using it for downloads as soon as possible (such as when a webhook is received), if you are looking to cache thumbnails with you.

caveat.Threads: derived from thumbnail_url/media_url — present only on posts that carry media (text-only Threads posts have none)
caveat.LinkedIn: derived from the post's media/article preview — present only when the post has an image, video, or shared article

fields.name: title
fields.desc: Title of the content item.

fields.name: type
fields.desc: Platform specific content type. - VIDEO / POST / STORY / TWEET / BLOG / IMAGE / THREAD / PODCAST / TRACK / REELS / STREAM / FEED / IGTV

fields.name: url
fields.desc: Profile URL on the connected platform.

fields.name: visibility
fields.desc: Visibility of a content item. Values can be PRIVATE / UNLISTED / PUBLIC

fields.name: age_distribution
fields.desc: Audience distribution by age range (percentage per range).

caveat.TikTok: ageDistribution empty_possible — populated only when account ≥ 100 followers

fields.name: cities
fields.desc: Audience distribution by city (percentage per city).

caveat.TikTok: cityDistribution empty_possible — populated only when account ≥ 100 followers

fields.name: countries
fields.desc: Audience distribution by country (percentage per country).

caveat.TikTok: countryDistribution empty_possible — populated only when account ≥ 100 followers

fields.name: gender_age_distribution
fields.desc: Joint audience distribution by gender × age range.

caveat.TikTok: demographics empty_possible — populated only when account ≥ 100 followers

fields.name: gender_distribution
fields.desc: Audience distribution by gender (percentage per gender).

caveat.TikTok: genderDistribution empty_possible — populated only when account ≥ 100 followers

fields.name: commenter_display_name
fields.desc: Full display name of the commenter profile.

fields.name: commenter_id
fields.desc: Unique identifier of the commenter's profile on the platform.

fields.name: commenter_profile_url
fields.desc: Commenter's profile URL on the connected platform.

fields.name: commenter_username
fields.desc: Commenter profile username.

fields.name: content.id
fields.desc: Unique ID of the content item.

fields.name: content.published_at
fields.desc: Content's published date and time on the platform.

fields.name: content.url
fields.desc: URL of the content item.

fields.name: external_id
fields.desc: Unique identifier of the profile on the platform.

fields.name: like_count
fields.desc: Total likes.

fields.name: reply_count
fields.desc: Total replies.

fields.name: text
fields.desc: Text content of the comment.

audienceNote: Offered = the platform’s API exposes it to us (from our per-platform support matrices). TikTok audience is offered too — gated above the ≥100-follower threshold (✓△). Threads & Twitch expose no audience demographics. LinkedIn audience is organization-only.
